## SCM Evaluation Benchmark — Annotator Registration

Thank you for your interest in participating. Please complete all fields below.

---

### 1. Professional information

**Full name:**  

**Bar association (Colegio de Abogados):**  

**Membership number (Matrícula):**  

**Jurisdiction of admission:**  
- [ ] CABA
- [ ] Buenos Aires Province
- [ ] Other Argentine province: ___
- [ ] Foreign jurisdiction: ___

### 2. Experience

**Years of legal practice:**  

**Primary practice areas** (select all that apply):
- [ ] Civil / Contract
- [ ] Commercial / Corporate
- [ ] Administrative law
- [ ] Criminal law
- [ ] Labor law
- [ ] Constitutional law
- [ ] Tax law
- [ ] Other: ___

**Preferred annotation domain** (we will assign cases from this area when possible):  

### 3. Availability

**Estimated availability:** ___ cases per week  
**Available period:** from ___ to ___

### 4. Ethics confirmation

- [ ] I am a licensed attorney with a valid Argentine bar association membership
- [ ] I will annotate independently, without discussing my annotations with other study participants
- [ ] I consent to the anonymized publication of my annotations under CC-BY 4.0
- [ ] I understand that participation is voluntary and unpaid, and that I will be credited in the study acknowledgments

### 5. Contact

**Email for coordination:**  

---

*After submission, you will be assigned an ANNOTATOR_ID and receive the annotation package (25 cases + annotation guide). Expected time: 10-20 minutes per case.*
